low: Air quality is good! You can enjoy outdoor activities comfortably.
Today is a great day to walk or cycle.
moderate: Sensitive groups (elderly, children, people with respiratory conditions) should consider reducing prolonged outdoor exertion.
very_high: Wear N95 mask if going outside is unavoidable.
hazardous: Stay indoors with all windows and doors closed.
Seek medical attention if experiencing difficulty breathing or chest pain.

conditions.asthma: Keep rescue inhaler nearby at all times.
conditions.heart_disease: Monitor heart rate and blood pressure regularly.
conditions.copd: Avoid exposure to smoke and dust. Carry bronchodilator medication.
conditions.pregnant: Limit outdoor time when AQI > 100 to protect your baby.
conditions.sinus: Wear PM2.5 filter mask to reduce sinus irritation.
conditions.allergies: Keep windows closed and use HEPA air purifier indoors.

warnings.high_risk: ⚠️ HIGH RISK ALERT: Your personalized AQI ({perceived_aqi}) exceeds the safe threshold. Take immediate precautions!
